# Your Pilate Crush — llms.txt

## About
Your Pilate Crush is a luxury private Pilates & Lagree coaching service by Candice, a certified STOTT Pilates and Lagree Fitness instructor. Sessions are delivered at the client's home, villa, or yacht — no studio. Equipment (including the Lagree Microformer machine) is transported and set up at the client's location.

## Instructor
- Name: Candice
- Certifications: STOTT PILATES Certified Instructor, Lagree Fitness Certified Instructor
- Languages: French, English

## Services & Pricing
- Lagree Microformer: 190 € / session · 1 300 € / 10-session pack
- Sculpt & Lagree (55-min signature session): 190 € / session · 1 300 € / 10-session pack
- Pilates Sculpt & Flow: 160 € / session · 1 200 € / 10-session pack
- Pilates Foundation: 150 € / session · 1 100 € / 10-session pack
- Stretch & Mobilité: 150 € / session · 1 100 € / 10-session pack
- All packs valid 3 months from first session. Travel and equipment included.

## Service Areas
- May – October: Côte d'Azur (Monaco, Nice, Cannes, Saint-Tropez and surrounding areas)
- November – April: Saint-Barthélemy (Gustavia, Saint-Jean, Flamands, Lorient)

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +33 6 51 59 02 16
- Email: yourpilatescrush@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.yourpilatecrush.studio
